title: The Most Powerful Claude Code Feature In Months Dropped & Nobody is Talking About It
summary: Graphify is a knowledge graph generation tool for Claude Code that creates structured representations of large code bases without relying on RAG. It reduces token overhead and improves accuracy of code analysis responses.
